movie.actors: Will Smith, Kevin Kline, Kenneth Branagh, Salma Hayek
movie.plot: The two best hired guns in the West must save President Grant from the clutches of a nineteenth century inventor-villain.
movie.title: Wild Wild West
movie.writer: Jim Thomas (story), John Thomas (story), S.S. Wilson (screenplay), Brent Maddock (screenplay), Jeffrey Price (screenplay), Peter S. Seaman (screenplay)
